task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the correct patient record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the patient name 'Mateo Matias' or 'Mateo Matías' (DOB: 1946-07-19) in the OpenMRS patient header or search results.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent documented the correct allergen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an entry in the Allergies section or an allergy form showing 'Iodinated contrast media', 'Iodinated contrast', or 'Iodine'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent documented the correct allergy reaction and severity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the reaction 'Urticaria' (or hives) and severity 'Moderate' associated with the contrast allergy in the patient's record.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent recorded the correct blood pressure and pulse.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a vitals capture form or clinical summary showing Blood Pressure as 128/78 and Pulse as 66.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent recorded the correct weight and temperature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a vitals capture form or clinical summary showing Weight as 72 kg and Temperature as 37.2 C.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent scheduled a follow-up appointment within the correct timeframe.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an appointment scheduling screen, confirmation, or upcoming appointments list showing a cardio-oncology follow-up scheduled for Mateo Matias within 28 days of the current system date.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenMRS graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the OpenMRS web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts making the changes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the correct URL (http://localhost/openmrs/spa) and the standard OpenMRS UI elements should be visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database manipulation to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of terminal windows running SQL commands or database clients modifying the OpenMRS database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Mateo Matías (DOB: 1946-07-19). Required Allergy: Iodinated contrast (Reaction: Urticaria, Severity: Moderate). Required Vitals: BP 128/78, Weight 72 kg, Pulse 66 bpm, Temp 37.2 C. Required Appointment: Follow-up scheduled within 28 days of the current date.
